events.appearance_notes: Observed event; The camera locks on a building, and then the camera rotates 360 degrees and still locks on the building.
events.event_text: From 0.0s to 15.1s, the camera locks on a building, and then the camera rotates 360 degrees and still locks on the building.

events.appearance_notes: Observed event; The bottom of the lens moves downward and then returns to the original state. The lens enlarges the field of view and then zooms back.
events.event_text: From 15.1s to 37.3s, the bottom of the lens moves downward and then returns to the original state. The lens enlarges the field of view and then zooms back.

events.appearance_notes: Observed event; The camera moves to the right, shines on the parking area, and then focuses on a silver car, showing the license plate at a glance.
events.event_text: From 37.3s to 54.5s, the camera moves to the right, shines on the parking area, and then focuses on a silver car, showing the license plate at a glance.

events.appearance_notes: High activity; Then the camera moves to the left to illuminate the license plate of another white car, then turns left again, and then zooms in.
events.event_text: From 54.5s to 77.1s, then the camera moves to the left to illuminate the license plate of another white car, then turns left again, and then zooms in.

events.appearance_notes: Observed event; The camera moves to the right to the highway. Several vehicles pass by the highway and focus on a pedestrian walking to the right on the sidewalk.
events.event_text: From 77.1s to 99.2s, the camera moves to the right to the highway. Several vehicles pass by the highway and focus on a pedestrian walking to the right on the sidewalk.

events.appearance_notes: Observed event; Then the focus was canceled and the man in black was shined on the right. The man in black then walked into the car, and the camera turned to the building again.
events.event_text: From 99.2s to 138.0s, then the focus was canceled and the man in black was shined on the right. The man in black then walked into the car, and the camera turned to the building again.
